title: Generator template extension manifest
description: Chrome extension-specific settings for a template. Paired with template.json (ShotStack Edit API format) in the same folder.

outputType.description: Primary output: image, audio, video, book (multi-page), or text

outputPresetId.description: Optional id from output-presets.json (e.g. youtube_16_9, instagram_1_1). Overrides dimensions from shotstack.json output when set.

inputSchema.description: Fields for the sidebar; same types as generator inputs: text, textarea, number, color, select, checkbox, list, file, hidden, voice

mergeField.description: Template merge variable name used as {{ mergeField }} in template.json. Prefer unique names to avoid collisions: e.g. TEXT_INPUT_1 or TEMPLATE_ID_TEXT_1 (e.g. AD_APPLE_NOTES_TEXT_1).

defaultWorkflowId.description: Optional workflow id for Run generator step / bulk generation

handler.description: Deprecated. All generation is template-only (template-engine + shared modules). Omit.

editorExtensions.description: Editor extension ids from generator/extensions/ (e.g. tts, stt). Loaded when the unified editor opens; they add toolbar buttons and export handlers.

editor.description: Hints for the unified editor (Fabric + GSAP)

editableObjectNames.description: Fabric object names that are user-editable in the editor

bookSettings.description: Default book layout when outputType is 'book'. Unified editor uses these when rendering/exporting book output; inputSchema can override per-field.
